arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Rangers – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou returns to Glasgow this evening as Tottenham take on Rangers in the Europa League. The former Celtic manager is under pressure after a difficult start to the season at Spurs, who surrendered a two-goal lead to lose to Chelsea at the weekend. arts.ttl: Exclusive: “Gross naivety” from Tottenham who are “not going to get away with it” after another collapse
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has had Tottenham playing some lovely football again this season, however, a lack of a solid defence is “gross naivety” according to Stan Collymore. The former Premier League star has admitted having a fondness for the Australian and the way he sees the game, but ill discipline at the back is stopping the […] The post Exclusive: “Gross naivety” from Tottenham who are “not going to get away with it” after another collapse appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It’s Scotland vs England in the Europa League tonight, as Tottenham travel to Ibrox to face Rangers. The two sides have identical records in this competition with three wins, one draw and one loss but Rangers sit one place above Spurs, due to a superior goal difference. This contest has got an added edge with […] The post Rangers vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Tottenham preview: Clement confident of memorable night
arts.sum: a former Celtic boss - is all too aware of the hostile atmosphere that will greet him when his Tottenham side travel to Ibrox to face Rangers on Thursday. They have won only one of their last seven matches - a remarkable 4-0 victory at Manchester City - amid a gruelling fixture list and a growing number of absentees.

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Tottenham Europa League score predicted as pressure mounts on Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham will be looking to avoid a fifth game without a win when they take on Rangers in the Europa League later today. Attention turns back to the Europa League later today for the Lilywhites as they travel to Scotland to take on Rangers.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists 'emotional' Cristian Romero was WRONG to criticise Tottenham's board - and reveals how showdown talks have gone between the club and player after he hit out at Daniel Levy
